title: Glowing totem of undying
description: Adds dynamic light source to totem of undying
body:
# Glowing totem of undying

- Resourcepack to add a lightsource to totem of undying.
- You dont need to hold torch in your offhand anymore!
- Works with other resource packs as it does not change any textures.
- Works with shaders.
## Dependencies
Glowing totem of undying requires the **LambDynamicLights** mod, as it uses dynamic lights feature. There are no other hard dependencies.
## Screenshots
![Glowing totem of undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s2EOCi7L/images/f3f0455d93ce0f99e18e10297f468b87045cfd33.png)
![Glowing totem of undying on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/s2EOCi7L/images/0d9e990b8e783d2d084dd520cf94a529a7156e8b.png)
